rulings.Case Title: YOSHABEL CLEMENTS VS. HARCOURT GROUP, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Defendants ' Motion To Set Aside Defaults
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 1. PLAINTIFF YOSHABEL CLEMENTS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Granting Defendant's Motion To Set Aside Defaults. DENIED, Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008. No new facts or circumstances not available to Plaintiff on September 30, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: OAK HOM WONG VS. KARIM BUSTAMI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 19, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT KARIM BUSTAMI AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. SFRO is not applicable to commercial tenancies. Complaint alleges a commercial tenancy. See Lease attached as Exhibit 1 to Complaint. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/REQ)
